description: Metadata for backlog.csv and pruned_log.csv benchmark collections
notes: All timings are wall-clock medians of 1000 random SU(4) unitaries per commit (seeds 0..999).
JAX JIT warmup (seed 9999) is run before the timed loop and not included.
Failed decompositions (numerical non-convergence) still contribute their wall-clock time to the median.
Results are only comparable across commits run on the same machine under similar load.
Commits with warmup failures are excluded (see BAD_COMMITS in scripts/collect_backlog.sh).
Commits predating 1e7924f (2025-07-23) are excluded as the numerics were not yet functional.
